calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity (post-Phase-3-enrichment retest; supersedes 610c)
items.note: INV-074 crystallization-necessity retest after substrate implementation IGW-20260601-023 (test_bed_enrichment_crystallization_necessity). V3-EXQ-610c FAILed with D2=False: control arm did NOT show predicted collapse (d2_delta -0.0057; needed >= +0.10). Diagnosis: CausalGridWorldV2 supplied no post-Phase-3 destabilizing pressure (env/test-bed ceiling). Substrate fix (2026-06-01T17:42:58Z): infant_curriculum Phase 3 now enables destabilizing dynamics (SD-047 multi_source_dynamics + SD-048 interoceptive_noise + accelerated env_drift). Prediction: control arm (ARM_0 crystallize=False) will NOW show entropy collapse under Phase-3 pressure (D2 delta >= +0.10); crystallized arm (ARM_1 crystallize=True) will preserve Phase-2 diversity (D1 delta >= +0.10). 2-arm discriminative (control vs test), 3 seeds (42/43/44), 2500 episodes through all 4 phases. Claims: INV-074 (primary), MECH-333, MECH-334. PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3 -> INV-074/MECH-333/MECH-334 all support. D2 FAIL again -> escalate to /diagnose-errors (substrate still insufficient). validate_experiments AST OK (already in ree-v3/experiments/); smoke test PASS (dry-run 5 eps both arms, no crash). Phase3-queue snapshot race mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: scaffolded_sd054_onboarding nursery/feeding substrate-readiness diagnostic (Stage-0 forced-feed + P0/P1 + P2-guard gates)
items.note: Full-scale substrate-readiness diagnostic for the scaffolded_sd054_onboarding NURSERY/FEEDING amend (ree-v3 e718bf4). NOT 603f; claim_ids=[] (tags no claim; weights no governance score). Runs the full developmental sequence on ONE strengthened scaffold config x3 seeds (42/43/44): Stage-0 run_stage0_nursery (forced supra-threshold benefit, decoupled from survival) -> P0 guided warm-up -> P1 easy->guarded foraging (hold_fraction=0.3 gentler schedule, P0 hazards=1) -> P2 frozen measurement under GUARDED hazard_food_attraction=0.3 + foraging-contact-rate readout. PRE-REGISTERED SUBSTRATE GATES (each >=2/3 seeds, via the substrate's own evaluate_substrate_gate): G0 Stage-0 z_goal_norm_peak>0.4 (forced-feed positive control); G1 P1 survival/foraging gate passed; G2 P2 contact_rate>0 (infant actually fed at measurement); G3 P2 z_goal_norm_peak>0.4 (goal forms ecologically). PASS=all four -> substrate ready: flip substrate_queue scaffolded_sd054_onboarding ready=true + unblock EXP-603F-POSTSUBSTRATE + queue V3-EXQ-603f (a follow-on /governance + /queue-experiment action, NOT automatic). FAIL=substrate_not_engaged/fed_but_no_goal -> route /failure-autopsy or /implement-substrate; DO NOT queue 603f; DO NOT silently re-tune (diagnostic weights no claim either way). Predecessor V3-EXQ-621a (pre-amend readiness; NOT superseded -- different design, this exercises the new Stage-0 method). validate_experiments AST OK; dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (Stage-0 lights z_goal; gate logic + interpretation branch + progress wired; FAIL at dry scale is correct). Phase3-queue snapshot race mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md post-commit dropped-file check.

items.title: modulatory-bias-selection-authority substrate-readiness (vigor/within-class/curiosity OFF vs ON)
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic) for modulatory-bias-selection-authority (landed fc09738). 3 levers (VIGOR/WITHIN_CLASS/CURIOSITY) x authority OFF-vs-ON on shared trained weights + identical RNG. PASS=every non-degenerate lever changes committed selection (action_density lift>=0.03 / committed-class entropy rise) without harm increase. Degenerate-bias arms (auth rescale never fires; curiosity 604a signature) report INVALID_HARNESS not FAIL. FAIL with auth_active>0 but no change routes to /failure-autopsy. Predecessor (NOT supersedes) 604a/624a/614d. PASS unblocks per-claim EVIDENCE retests of MECH-314/320/341 + MECH-343.
